title.rendered: Welcome to the new Travel FX website!

content.rendered:
Travel FX is excited to announce the launch of our brand-new website! After months in the works, we are happy to officially share it with you. 

The website features a new brand and refreshed look with improved functionality and will work seamlessly on desktop, tablet and mobile.

Our main goal in launching this new website is to provide you with a faster, simpler process for buying travel money along with introducing some new services.

Our Services – Old and New

Travel money – order online and get currency delivered to your door

Travel FX was built on our award-winning travel money service, the new site offers the same great service made simpler, as always with market-leading rates and excellent customer service.  You can also log into your account and track your order.

NEW! Currency buy backs – Sell your holiday money

We can now buy back your unused travel money. It’s a simple process, just fill in a form with your currency and bank details, pop it in an envelope with your currency and send it to us (recorded and insured), we do the rest and pay the money into your account.  You will be able to track your currency buyback order in your client area.

NEW! International transfers

You can now make international payments to more than 157 countries around the world.  Our bank-beating rates will give you massive savings on your international transfers. We currently transfer to 157+ countries and this list will continue to grow.

Coming soon! Currency and rate reminders

You can now set reminders to order travel cash or set a rate reminder for a certain rate, so if the exchange rate reaches your selected target, we will send you an email alert.

New and improved client area

You can now log in to your account and see the progress of your orders and order history.

NEW! Blog

This is our new blog where we’ll be publishing regular content on helpful topics that we’re passionate about— including travel money, foreign exchange and money-saving tips and more. 

In summary

Welcome to our new site and blog, we continue to offer the same great services, just bigger and better! We would like to thank all our clients old and new and we hope you enjoy the new site and find the new services useful.  Look out for more announcements, we have more exciting plans we are developing for the future!

Want to do more?

  • Buy travel money
  • Sell foreign currency
  • Make an international transfer
